value.found_quote: Claude Code on the web runs tasks on Anthropic-managed cloud infrastructure at [claude.ai/code](https://claude.ai/code). Sessions persist even if you close your browser, and you can monitor them from the Claude mobile app.
value.rationale: The page describes Claude Code on the web running tasks on Anthropic-managed cloud infrastructure, startable from browser/phone, monitored remotely, with sessions persisting after disconnect ("Sessions persist even if you close your browser"). It also states "Each session runs in a fresh Anthropic-managed VM with your repository cloned." All claim elements are substantiated. The page notes it is "in research preview," hence preview status.
